name: skynettechnologies/silverstripe-allinoneaccessibility
description: The free SilverStripe Accessibility plugin is designed for organizations that want to offer a more inclusive digital experience, it adds an accessibility widget that supports users with diverse needs through features aligned WCAG 2.1, 2.2, ADA, EAA, Section 508, France RGAA, California Unruh, European EAA EN 301 549, UK Equality Act, Spain UNE 139803:2012, Australian DDA, Israeli Standard 5568, Ontario AODA, Canada ACA, German BITV, Brazilian Inclusion Law (LBI 13.146/2015), JIS X 8341 (Japan), Italian Stanca Act, Indian RPwD Act, Switzerland DDA and other accessibility standards.
